targets.name: EtaExistence
targets.statement: There exists eta > 0 such that rho_minus_pt(r1) >= eta.

targets.name: RhoMinusPtBoundaryComputation
targets.statement: The expression rho_minus_pt(r1) is computed from the GRF transition-shell data.

targets.name: FirstCellPositivityCertificate
targets.statement: rho_minus_pt is positive on the first radial cell adjacent to r1.

targets.name: MultiCellIntervalCertificate
targets.statement: rho_minus_pt satisfies the required lower-bound inequality on all declared transition-shell cells.

targets.name: WECDECClosure
targets.statement: The declared GRF matter profile satisfies the required WEC/DEC inequalities on the certified domain.

targets.name: MatchingTheorem
targets.statement: The inner-boundary margin certificate is compatible with the matching conditions.

targets.name: PhysicalRealizationTheorem
targets.statement: The certified profile is physically realized by admissible GRF data.

targets.name: GRFTheoremLevelClosure
targets.statement: Eta existence, boundary computation, interval positivity, energy-condition closure, matching, and physical realization jointly imply GRF theorem-level closure for this margin target.

conditional_closure_rule: GRFTheoremLevelClosure follows only after all seven predecessor targets are closed.
